story: An opening image introduces a boys frienship in a world full of possibility. A sudden problem interrupts a boys frienship and creates a clear mission. A boys frienship follows a clue into a striking new place. A difficult choice tests a boys frienship when the journey becomes dangerous. A boys frienship discovers the courage needed to change the outcome.
